mapper.sql: select tag_id, tag_name, tag_type, tag_color, sort_order, status, del_flag, park_id, create_by, create_time, update_time from biz_tag
mapper.select: order by tag_type asc, sort_order asc, tag_id asc
order by tag_type asc, sort_order asc, tag_id asc
select count(1) from information_schema.tables where table_schema = database() and table_name = #{tableName}
select type_id as typeId, type_name as typeName, sort_order as sortOrder, status, del_flag as delFlag from biz_tag_type where type_id = #{tagType} and status = '0' and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select t.tag_id, t.tag_name, t.tag_type, t.tag_color, t.sort_order, t.status, t.del_flag, t.park_id, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_time from biz_tag t inner join biz_customer_tag ct on t.tag_id = ct.tag_id where ct.customer_id = #{customerId} and t.status = '0' and t.del_flag = '0' order by t.tag_type asc, t.sort_order asc, t.tag_id asc

select t.tag_id, t.tag_name, t.tag_type, t.tag_color, t.sort_order, t.status, t.del_flag, t.park_id, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_time from biz_tag t inner join biz_business_opportunity_tag ot on t.tag_id = ot.tag_id where ot.opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} and t.status = '0' and t.del_flag = '0' order by t.tag_type asc, t.sort_order asc, t.tag_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into biz_tag
tag_name, tag_type, tag_color, sort_order, status, del_flag, park_id, create_by, create_time, update_time,
#{tagName}, #{tagType}, #{tagColor}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{parkId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update: update biz_tag set del_flag = '1' where tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.insert:
insert into biz_customer_tag (customer_id, tag_id, create_time) values
(#{customerId}, #{tagId}, now())

insert into biz_business_opportunity_tag (opportunity_id, tag_id, create_time) values
(#{opportunityId}, #{tagId}, now())
